task: Ralph R12 (2026-05-15): zap all remaining unfixed bugs from R10/R11 carry-over + any new bugs surfaced during retest. Rate limits stay OFF on dodev for QA; NO security weakening. Use sonnet agents for testing, opus agents for root cause + fix. Commit, push, merge to main if local, deploy to dev (dodev.fid.pw), re-verify. Never bind 0.0.0.0. Never touch prod.

stories.title: Inventory all R10/R11/R12 bug files + live-test dev to determine still-open set
acceptanceCriteria: testcases/99-runlog/R12-STATUS.md written — 11 bugs classified: 7 ZAPPED, 2 WONTFIX, 2 STILL-OPEN (trailing-slash + PDF E2E unverified)
Live HTTP probes captured for every bug + status table written
Deterministic still-open vs zapped list produced — 2 STILL-OPEN driving R12 implementation work

stories.title: Confirm dodev rate-limit posture: rate limits OFF; security features ON
acceptanceCriteria: Rate-limit kill switch shipped via PR #35 (RATE_LIMIT_DISABLED env var honored by middleware/rate-limit.ts)
dodev .env updated: RATE_LIMIT_DISABLED=true (verified via grep)
doable.service restarted; services back on 127.0.0.1 only (ss -tlnp confirms NO 0.0.0.0)
Security 9/9 PASS — CORS allowlist, MFA, RLS, JWT, CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, no public ports, cookie flags — all verified by posture agent
Posture documented in testcases/99-runlog/R12-RATELIMIT-POSTURE.md

stories.title: Root-cause + fix BUG-R11-PDF-ATTACHMENT-IGNORED-001 (P1) — verify fix branch lands on dev
acceptanceCriteria: Code fix shipped in PR #19 (commit 852beea7) and on main; migration 083 in services/api/src/db/migrations/ honored by primary loader in services/api/src/db/migrate.ts:36-57
DEPLOYED on dev (HEAD at f03422d4 includes PR #19 + #35); ai_sessions has workspace_id column
Full SSE+app-content E2E probe TIMED OUT at 5min in R12 verification agent — CARRY OVER to R13
R13 should re-run scripts/r11-pdf-attach-test.ts with 10-min budget and inspect generated App.tsx for SRS-derived content + non-empty chat history

stories.title: BUG-R10-AUTH-PASSWORD-RESET-404-001 — re-verify /auth/password-reset 200 on dev post-deploy
acceptanceCriteria: Fix from PR #13 (commit 10bad3b6) merged to main; live on dev
POST https://dev-api.doable.me/auth/password-reset anon and authed → 200 with anti-enumeration envelope (verified by R12 inventory agent)
Body never reveals whether email exists

stories.title: BUG-R10-MFA-ENROLL-500-DOABLE-KEK-001 — verify dev has DOABLE_KEK set + boot fail-fast works
acceptanceCriteria: ssh dodev grep DOABLE_KEK /root/doable/.env → returns value (verified)
POST /auth/mfa/enroll/start with JWT → 200 with secret/otpauthUrl (verified by R12 inventory agent)
Body contains NO 'DOABLE_KEK' literal string

stories.title: BUG-R10-PROJECT-FILES-EMPTY-200-001 + BUG-R11-SEC-RLS-PROJECT-FILES-200 — verify 404 on unknown project
acceptanceCriteria: Fix from PR #15 (commit a28981bd) merged to main; live on dev
GET /projects/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000/files authed → 404 (verified)
Cross-tenant GET /projects/<other-uuid>/files → 404 (verified by R12 inventory agent)

stories.title: BUG-R11-VERSIONS-EACCES-500-001 — verify fix landed + 500 with /boot/lost+found leak gone
acceptanceCriteria: Fix from PR #12 (commit ea76d024) merged to main; live on dev
POST /projects/<id>/versions with body {projectPath:'/'} → 400 (NOT 500); no /boot or EACCES leak (verified by R12 inventory agent)

stories.title: BUG-R10-TRAILING-SLASH-AUTH-DROP-001 (P2) — root-cause + fix the 308 redirect Authorization-strip
acceptanceCriteria: Opus tracer pinned root cause to services/api/src/index.ts:289-319 308 redirect (testcases/evidence/dev/r12-trailing-slash-trace.md)
Fix shipped in PR #35 commit 166c94af: top-level `new Hono({ strict: false })` + 84 sub-routers with strict:false + 308 middleware deleted
tsc clean (0 errors); scripts/r12-test-trailing-slash.ts 47/47 in-process assertions PASS
Live dev: GET /templates/ returns 401 (no auth) not 308 — fix confirmed deployed (smoke probe 2026-05-15 09:38)
Bug file status updated to FIXED with commit 166c94af reference

stories.title: BUG-R10-AUTH-LOGOUT-ANON-200-001 (P3) — make a product call + apply
acceptanceCriteria: Product decision: idempotent logout 200 for anon is intentional; rationale (SDK cleanup paths + stateless JWTs) documented
Inline WONTFIX comment added to services/api/src/routes/auth/core.ts:170-176 pinning the contract
